name: Light-n-Fluffy Wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and lemon juice in a large bowl.
2. Stir in honey, butter, dried buttermilk powder, potato flakes, wheat germ, gluten, and salt until well mixed.
3. Add whole wheat flour and bread flour; mix until smooth.
4. Mix in active dry yeast.
5. Shape dough into a loaf and place on a baking sheet.
6. Select basic white bread or delayed timer setting for light crust.
7. Adjust water amount based on humidity if needed.
8. Bake at the desired temperature until cooked through.
